title: View source expands container instead of scrolling
close_reason: Fixed source view to constrain height with max-height: 50vh and scroll instead of expanding container

title: Double-click to maximize only works on header/controls class
description: The dblclick handler checks for browser-header or controls class but misses the url-bar and other header children. Most of the toolbar area doesn't respond to double-click.

title: Add null guards to toggleShareMenu
Add all related components with GitHub Pages links
Expose z-index as CSS custom properties
Fix lint errors and gate publish on lint+test
Replace inline onclick handlers with event listeners (CSP)
Address codex-review findings
description: Address the prioritized bugs and maintenance items documented in codex-review.md, starting with the source-refresh bug, theme mode inconsistency, CSP-incompatible inline handlers, and the failing lint/test quality gates.
close_reason: Addressed in the current v1.4.1 state

title: Refetch source when src attribute changes dynamically
Device bezels disappear on dark backgrounds
description: Dark device bezels (midnight) become invisible on dark page backgrounds. Need a subtle glow or border to separate the device frame from the page.

title: Fix mode getter to respect prefers-color-scheme for iframe sync
Tighten d.ts types and fix CLAUDE.md stale info
description: mode should be union type, device should list presets. CLAUDE.md port/build info is stale.

title: Add focus management to maximize/dialog mode
Add theme toggle to header
description: Add a theme toggle button (🌓) to the navigation header that switches between light/dark mode with localStorage persistence, matching code-block's implementation.
close_reason: Implemented docs site alignment with code-block

title: Simplify Quick Start section
description: Reduce Quick Start to installation (npm/CDN tabs) plus a single basic usage example, followed by a CTA to view more examples. Remove the extra 'Basic Usage' and 'Dark Mode' subsections.
close_reason: Implemented docs site alignment with code-block

title: Prefix internal methods with _ for clean API surface
description: Rename handleClose, handleKeydown, createOverlay, removeOverlay, attachEventListeners, handleIframeError, retryLoad, updateContentView, handleOutsideClick, escapeHtml with _ prefix. Regenerate CEM to strip them.

title: Fix slotted content not resizing to container
description: Slotted content does not expand to fill the browser-window container when resized. The content area shows empty space instead of the slotted content filling the available space.
close_reason: Fixed slotted content to properly fill container using flex: 1 layout. Removed duplicate ::slotted(*) rules that were conflicting. Content now expands correctly from min-height 200px to fill available space.

title: Add missing documentation for new CSS tokens and features
description: inner-radius, border-width, border-style tokens undocumented. Device toolbar feature undocumented. z-index tokens missing from API docs.

title: Add ESLint and Prettier
description: Install ESLint + Prettier, configure for web components, add npm scripts (lint, lint:fix, format). Run initial format pass on codebase.

title: Update theme toggle to emoji style
Cancel fetch on disconnect with AbortController
description: fetchSourceCode() can complete after element is disconnected, updating stale state.

title: Generate Custom Elements Manifest
description: Install @custom-elements-manifest/analyzer. Configure analyzer for the component. Generate custom-elements.json for IDE support. Update package.json exports. Add npm script: analyze

title: Fix distorted control button circles
description: The window control buttons (close/minimize/maximize) appear as ovals instead of perfect circles. This was caused by padding/margin adjustments for touch targets. Need to fix while maintaining touch-friendly hit areas.

title: Add links to Features section
description: Add hyperlinks to each feature card that link to the relevant demo or API documentation section. For example, 'Source Viewing' should link to demos.html#source-viewing or similar.
close_reason: Implemented docs site alignment with code-block

title: Clean up copy button timeout on disconnect/toggle
Clean up custom-elements.json: exclude private methods
description: CEM analyzer exposes 18+ underscore-prefixed private methods as public API.

title: Improve mobile touch targets
description: Increase control button touch targets (44px minimum). Add responsive breakpoint for narrow screens. Consider hiding URL bar text on very small screens. Test on mobile viewport sizes.

title: Add Web Test Runner
description: Install @web/test-runner and @open-wc/testing. Create test configuration. Write initial test suite covering: component renders, attributes, light/dark mode, minimize/maximize states, source view toggle. Add npm scripts: test, test:watch

title: Refactor styles.css to match code-block
description: Align CSS variable names, colors, dark mode approach, and component styling to match the code-block site standard
close_reason: Refactored CSS and HTML to match code-block site standard

title: Remove gradients from demo
description: The demo page uses gradient backgrounds which may be distracting. Simplify the demos to use solid colors or simpler styling.
close_reason: Replaced gradient demo with simpler CSS Flexbox demo

title: Fix README dimensions, syntax-highlighted claim, and doc gaps
description: Galaxy S24 is 360x780 not 412x915. iPad Pro 13 is 1032x1376 not 1024x1366. Remove syntax-highlighted claim. Add --browser-window-margin to docs. Add CSS parts to CEM.

title: Dark mode text contrast issue in slotted content
description: On demos page dark mode, inline code badges inside slotted content have poor contrast — dark text on dark background. The component's dark palette isn't reaching slotted light-DOM content.

title: Device mode has no source view or share toolbar
description: Device mode renders phone/tablet chrome only — no view source, share, or download buttons. This limits the component's utility for tutorials in device mode.

title: Add Related Components section
description: Add a 'Related Components' section before the footer with links to sibling ProfPowell web components: code-block, terminal-window, browser-console, http-component. Each with name and brief description.
close_reason: Implemented docs site alignment with code-block

title: Fix device toolbar pill radius fallback mismatch
description: Device toolbar uses var(--browser-window-border-radius, 20px) but default is 8px.

title: Update footer style to match code-block
description: Update footer styling to match code-block's footer format with MIT License, GitHub link, and attribution links.
close_reason: Implemented docs site alignment with code-block

title: Fix duplicate aria-label on close/minimize buttons
description: Both close and minimize buttons say 'Minimize window'. Close should have distinct label.

title: Standardize footer to single-line format
Guard customElements.define for idempotent registration
Address follow-up review findings from 2026-03-23
description: Triage and address the current review findings captured in codex-review.md and claude-review.md. Prioritize the share-menu outside-click behavior under Shadow DOM, consolidating iframe recreation/lifecycle wiring (including safe-area reinjection and retry behavior), and the remaining accessibility contract issues around modal focus handling and toolbar labeling. Follow with manifest/docs cleanup and targeted Playwright coverage for share/copy/retry flows.

title: Add CSS-based resize
description: Add resize: both and overflow: auto to host element. Ensure source view follows container size. Add min-width/min-height constraints. Test maximize mode still works properly.

title: Fix iframe load race on cached content
description: attachEventListeners adds iframe load handler after render. Cached iframes may fire load before listener attached.

title: Add minimum device scale threshold
description: Device scaling has no floor. Add Math.max(0.5, ...) to prevent unreadable frames on very small screens.

title: Fix share menu listener leak (async setTimeout race)
Respect prefers-color-scheme
description: Add auto theme detection with prefers-color-scheme media query. Keep mode attribute as override (explicit mode wins). Logic: mode attribute > system preference > light default. Add tests for theme behavior.

title: Add missing test coverage for 11 untested features
description: Close button, clipboard copy, share menu, CodePen, error/retry, Escape key, resize, download, focus management, device+maximize.

title: Source view doesn't fill maximized window
description: When maximized via green button, toggling view source shows code but it doesn't fill the 90vh available space — huge empty gap below the code.

title: Device source view should render inside the device frame
description: Source view in device mode currently hides the device and shows code in a separate panel. It should render inside the device iframe area instead, keeping the bezel context. Horizontal scroll is acceptable.

title: Fix halo/glow artifact on device frame bottom bezel
description: The box-shadow ring (rgba 255,255,255,0.08) on .device-frame creates a visible white halo effect around the bottom bezel area in light mode. Needs to be removed or limited to dark contexts only.

title: Fix close button behavior and aria-label mismatch
Create API documentation
description: Create proper API documentation for the component beyond just README.md. Consider JSDoc, a docs site, or structured documentation for attributes, events, CSS properties, and methods.
close_reason: Enhanced JSDoc with all CSS custom properties and regenerated custom-elements.json

title: Switch to Vite dev server
description: Replace Python http.server with Vite for better DX including hot module reload. Update npm scripts and add vite as devDependency.
close_reason: Replaced Python http.server with Vite dev server for better DX and HMR support

title: Add data-mode to API docs, make margin a token, cross-origin logging consistency
description: Three small fixes: document data-mode in api.html, make margin a CSS custom property, consistent console.info for cross-origin.

title: Add property setters for attribute reflection
Fix outside-click to use composedPath and add null safety
description: Use e.composedPath().includes(menu) instead of menu.contains(e.target). Add ?. null safety on this.shadowRoot in _handleOutsideClick.

title: Fix retryLoad() missing safe area injection in device mode
description: After retry, iframe load handler doesn't call _injectSafeAreas() for device mode.

title: Expand demos and documentation
description: Create demo showcasing all features (light/dark, resize, source view). Add demo for each attribute combination. Update README with comprehensive usage examples. Document CSS custom properties.

title: Fix overlay style tag accumulation in document head
Replace hardcoded test timeouts with waitForFunction
description: Multiple waitForTimeout(500) calls in tests are brittle. Use condition-based waits.

title: DRY up tripled dark mode CSS
Add iframe error handler to source view restore paths
description: _updateBrowserSourceView and _updateDeviceSourceView restore iframe with load handler but no error handler. Retry UI won't appear after source toggle.

title: Move hero demo above CTA buttons
description: Restructure hero section to show the live browser-window demo above the 'View Demos' and 'API Docs' buttons, matching code-block's layout where the demo is inline in the hero.
close_reason: Implemented docs site alignment with code-block
